sql.where:
A.isDel = 0 and A.constructionIdx = B.id
and ${param.searchField} like '%${param.searchWord}%'
and ( date_format(startDate, '%Y-%m-%d') >= #{param.startDate} and date_format(endDate, '%Y-%m-%d') <= #{param.endDate} )
and A.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}

if.test: param.searchField != null and param.searchField != '' and param.searchWord != null and param.searchWord != ''
param.startDate != null and param.startDate != '' and param.endDate != null and param.endDate != ''

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DEVICE A, TB_CONSTRUCTION B

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT AA.zone , AA.machineNumber , BB.dis_count as totalCountByZone , IFNULL(CC.dis_count, 0) as countByZone , IFNULL(DD.dis_count, 0) as todayCnt , IFNULL(EE.dis_count, 0) as yesterdayCnt , AA.id , AA.lavelNo , AA.name , AA.constructionIdx , AA.bluetoothNo , AA.tabletNo , AA.password , AA.weContact , AA.tabletManager , AA.conduct , AA.startDate , AA.endDate FROM ( SELECT getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(A.pileNo), B.id) as zone, B.machineNumber, B.id, B.lavelNo, C.name, B.constructionIdx, B.bluetoothNo, B.tabletNo, B.password , B.weContact , B.tabletManager , B.conduct , date_format(B.startDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as startDate , date_format(B.endDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate from TB_REPORT A, TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C where 1=1 AND A.deviceIdx = B.id and B.constructionIdx = C.id AND B.isDel = 0 AND A.isDel = 0 AND A.deviceIdx in (SELECT id FROM TB_DEVICE WHERE constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx} AND isDel = 0) GROUP BY zone, machineNumber, id, lavelNo, C.name,B.constructionIdx, B.bluetoothNo, B.tabletNo, B.password , B.weContact , B.tabletManager , B.conduct, date_format(B.startDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), date_format(B.endDate, '%Y-%m-%d')) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (select getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) as zone , count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) as dis_count from TB_REPORT p where p.deviceIdx in (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) and p.isDel = 0 group by zone) BB ON AA.ZONE = BB.ZONE LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) as zone , p.deviceIdx , count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) as dis_count from TB_REPORT p where p.deviceIdx in (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) and p.isDel = 0 group by zone, deviceIdx) CC ON AA.ZONE = CC.ZONE and AA.id = CC.deviceIdx LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) as zone , p.deviceIdx , count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) as dis_count from TB_REPORT p where p.deviceIdx in (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) and p.isDel = 0 and p.currentDateTime = DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%Y-%m-%d') group by zone, deviceIdx) DD ON AA.ZONE = DD.ZONE and AA.id = DD.deviceIdx LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) as zone , p.deviceIdx , count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) as dis_count from TB_REPORT p where p.deviceIdx in (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) and p.isDel = 0 and p.currentDateTime = DATE_FORMAT(date_add(NOW(), interval -1 day) , '%Y-%m-%d') group by zone, deviceIdx) EE ON AA.ZONE = EE.ZONE and AA.id = EE.deviceIdx WHERE 1=1 union ALL SELECT CASE WHEN A.id IN (3046, 3047) THEN 'CDC외' ELSE '' END AS zone -- 여기 수정 , A.machineNumber , IFNULL(( SELECT count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) FROM TB_REPORT p WHERE p.deviceIdx IN (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) AND p.isDel = 0 AND getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) = CASE WHEN A.id IN (3046, 3047) THEN 'CDC외' ELSE '' END ), 0) AS totalCountByZone , 0 AS countByZone , 0 AS todayCnt , 0 AS yesterdayCnt , A.id , A.lavelNo , B.name , A.constructionIdx , A.bluetoothNo , A.tabletNo , A.password , A.weContact , A.tabletManager , A.conduct , date_format(A.startDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as startDate , date_format(A.endDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate from TB_DEVICE A, TB_CONSTRUCTION B where A.machineNumber not in ( select machineNumber from ( SELECT getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(A.pileNo), B.id) as zone, B.machineNumber from TB_REPORT A, TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C where 1=1 AND A.deviceIdx = B.id and B.constructionIdx = C.id AND B.isDel = 0 AND A.deviceIdx in (SELECT id FROM TB_DEVICE WHERE constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx} AND isDel = 0) GROUP BY zone, machineNumber) ASD) AND A.isDel = 0 AND A.constructionIdx = B.id AND A.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) AAA

SELECT A.machineNumber, A.id, A.lavelNo, B.name, A.constructionIdx, A.bluetoothNo, A.tabletNo, (SELECT deviceName FROM TB_DEVICE_NAME WHERE TB_DEVICE_NAME.deviceIdx = A.id) as deviceName , A.usimNo, A.password , A.weContact , A.tabletManager , A.conduct , date_format(A.startDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as startDate , date_format(A.endDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate, (select count(distinct deviceIdx, location, pileNo) as dis_count from TB_REPORT where TB_REPORT.deviceIdx = A.id and TB_REPORT.isDel = 0) as totalCnt, (select count(distinct deviceIdx, location, pileNo) as dis_count from TB_REPORT where TB_REPORT.deviceIdx = A.id and TB_REPORT.isDel = 0 and TB_REPORT.currentDateTime = DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%Y-%m-%d')) as todayCnt, (select count(distinct deviceIdx, location, pileNo) as dis_count from TB_REPORT where TB_REPORT.deviceIdx = A.id and TB_REPORT.isDel = 0 and TB_REPORT.currentDateTime = DATE_FORMAT(date_add(NOW(), interval -1 day) , '%Y-%m-%d')) as yesterdayCnt FROM TB_DEVICE A, TB_CONSTRUCTION B
ORDER BY machineNumber asc LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}

SELECT AAA.zone, AAA.machineNumber, AAA.totalCountByZone, AAA.countByZone, AAA.todayCnt, AAA.yesterdayCnt, AAA.id, AAA.lavelNo, AAA.name, AAA.constructionIdx, AAA.bluetoothNo, AAA.tabletNo, AAA.password, AAA.weContact, AAA.tabletManager, AAA.conduct, AAA.startDate, AAA.endDate FROM ( SELECT AA.zone, AA.machineNumber, BB.dis_count as totalCountByZone, IFNULL(CC.dis_count, 0) as countByZone, IFNULL(DD.dis_count, 0) as todayCnt, IFNULL(EE.dis_count, 0) as yesterdayCnt, AA.id, AA.lavelNo, AA.name, AA.constructionIdx, AA.bluetoothNo, AA.tabletNo, AA.password, AA.weContact, AA.tabletManager, AA.conduct, AA.startDate, AA.endDate FROM ( SELECT getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(A.pileNo), B.id) as zone, B.machineNumber, B.id, B.lavelNo, C.name, B.constructionIdx, B.bluetoothNo, B.tabletNo, B.password, B.weContact, B.tabletManager, B.conduct, date_format(B.startDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as startDate, date_format(B.endDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate FROM TB_REPORT A, TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C WHERE A.deviceIdx = B.id AND B.constructionIdx = C.id AND B.isDel = 0 AND A.isDel = 0 AND A.deviceIdx IN (SELECT id FROM TB_DEVICE WHERE constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx} AND isDel = 0) GROUP BY zone, machineNumber, id, lavelNo, C.name, B.constructionIdx, B.bluetoothNo, B.tabletNo, B.password, B.weContact, B.tabletManager, B.conduct, date_format(B.startDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), date_format(B.endDate, '%Y-%m-%d') ) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) as zone, count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) as dis_count FROM TB_REPORT p WHERE p.deviceIdx IN (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) AND p.isDel = 0 GROUP BY zone ) BB ON AA.ZONE = BB.ZONE LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) as zone, p.deviceIdx, count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) as dis_count FROM TB_REPORT p WHERE p.deviceIdx IN (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) AND p.isDel = 0 GROUP BY zone, deviceIdx ) CC ON AA.ZONE = CC.ZONE AND AA.id = CC.deviceIdx LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) as zone, p.deviceIdx, count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) as dis_count FROM TB_REPORT p WHERE p.deviceIdx IN (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) AND p.isDel = 0 AND p.currentDateTime = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY zone, deviceIdx ) DD ON AA.ZONE = DD.ZONE AND AA.id = DD.deviceIdx LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) as zone, p.deviceIdx, count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) as dis_count FROM TB_REPORT p WHERE p.deviceIdx IN (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) AND p.isDel = 0 AND p.currentDateTime = DATE_FORMAT(date_add(NOW(), interval -1 day), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY zone, deviceIdx ) EE ON AA.ZONE = EE.ZONE AND AA.id = EE.deviceIdx WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN A.id IN (3046, 3047) THEN 'CDC외' ELSE '' END AS zone -- 여기 수정 , A.machineNumber , IFNULL(( SELECT count(distinct p.deviceIdx, p.location, p.pileNo) FROM TB_REPORT p WHERE p.deviceIdx IN (SELECT dvs.id FROM TB_DEVICE dvs WHERE dvs.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx}) AND p.isDel = 0 AND getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(p.pileNo), p.deviceIdx) = CASE WHEN A.id IN (3046, 3047) THEN 'CDC외' ELSE '' END ), 0) AS totalCountByZone , 0 AS countByZone , 0 AS todayCnt , 0 AS yesterdayCnt , A.id , A.lavelNo , B.name , A.constructionIdx , A.bluetoothNo , A.tabletNo , A.password , A.weContact , A.tabletManager , A.conduct, date_format(A.startDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as startDate, date_format(A.endDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate FROM TB_DEVICE A, TB_CONSTRUCTION B WHERE A.machineNumber NOT IN ( SELECT machineNumber FROM ( SELECT getZoneNameForSamsung3(TRIM(A.pileNo), B.id) as zone, B.machineNumber FROM TB_REPORT A, TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C WHERE A.deviceIdx = B.id AND B.constructionIdx = C.id AND B.isDel = 0 AND A.deviceIdx IN (SELECT id FROM TB_DEVICE WHERE constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx} AND isDel = 0) GROUP BY zone, machineNumber ) ASD ) AND A.isDel = 0 AND A.constructionIdx = B.id AND A.constructionIdx = ${param.constructionIdx} ) AAA
ORDER BY ( CASE WHEN AAA.zone = 'CDC외' THEN 0 WHEN AAA.zone = '' OR AAA.zone IS NULL THEN 900 ELSE ABS(SUBSTRING_INDEX((CASE WHEN AAA.zone = 'ept' THEN '800 Zone' ELSE AAA.zone END), ' ', 1)) END ) ASC, ABS(machineNumber) ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DEVICE ( lavelNo, machineNumber, constructionIdx, bluetoothNo, tabletNo, usimNo , password , tabletManager , weContact , startDate, endDate ) VALUES ( #{lavelNo}, #{machineNumber}, #{constructionIdx}, #{bluetoothNo}, #{tabletNo}, #{usimNo}, #{password} , #{tabletManager} , #{weContact} , #{startDate}, #{endDate} )
